WHERE student.major <= 600 AND student.advisor = 1121 AND student.city_code = 'BAL' AND student.sex = 'F'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which student entities with major at most '600' and advisor equal to '1121' and city code equal to 'BAL' and sex equal to 'F', having at least one related has pet record (linked on student.stuid = has_pet.stuid), whose has pet record itself has at least one related pets record (linked on has_pet.petid = pets.petid)?

qa_pairs.question: Who are the students from city_code HKG with a major of at most 600 who have pets weighing exactly 9.3 that are at least 1 year old?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN has_pet ON student.stuid = has_pet.stuid
JOIN pets ON has_pet.petid = pets.petid
WHERE student.major <= 600 AND pets.pet_age >= 1 AND pets.weight = 9.3 AND student.city_code = 'HKG'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which student entities with major at most '600' and city code equal to 'HKG', having at least one related has pet record (linked on student.stuid = has_pet.stuid), whose has pet record itself has at least one related pets record (linked on has_pet.petid = pets.petid) with pet age at least '1' and weight equal to '9.3'?
